title: Fermented Fluffy Adventurous Spring Onion Stir-fry
description: A nut-free-friendly fermented and fluffy Korean dish featuring marinated spring onions in a savory sauce for a unique twist on traditional stir-fries.
instructions: Wash and chop the spring onions into thin strips.
In a large saucepan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add chopped garlic cloves and sauté until fragrant (about 1 minute).
Add spring onion strips to the pan and cook for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until they begin to soften but are still crisp.
If using fermented black beans, add them now and stir-fry for another minute. If not, skip this step.

Pour in vegetable broth and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low, cover the pan with a lid, and let it simmer for 10-15 minutes until the liquid has slightly thickened and absorbed most of the flavors.
Adjust seasoning with salt or soy sauce as needed. Stir in green onions just before serving.
Serve hot with steamed rice or noodles.
